name: drop-beacon-mcp
description: Search EDC products, track drops, compare prices, and get market trends from edc4me.com. Covers 1,000+ brands across knives, fidgets, flashlights, pens, wallets, and more.
author: Drop Beacon

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search EDC products by keyword, category, or brand

tools.name: get_latest_drops
tools.description: Get new EDC product drops from the last 7 days

tools.name: get_brand_info
tools.description: Brand stats, price range, and top products

tools.name: get_price_comparison
tools.description: Compare prices across retailers for the same product

tools.name: get_market_trends
tools.description: Sell-through velocity, top movers, and price distribution

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Real-time stock check across all retailers
